issue: seg referenced outside for-of block scope — ReferenceError crashes pathTokens for any resource path with segments >3 chars
fix: Move length check inside loop body: for (const seg of resourcePath.split('/')) { if (seg.length > 3) tokens.add(seg); }

issue: JSON.parse for private fixture outside try/catch — malformed private fixture crashes entire run with TypeError
fix: Move private fixture loading inside the try block alongside the public load

issue: String(prompt || '') converts undefined to 'undefined' string; timeoutMs parameter accepted but not forwarded at call site
fix: Use String(prompt ?? '') and explicitly pass timeoutMs at run-skill-benchmark.cjs:114

issue: expected.resources undefined (not []) leads to all resources counted as wasted; D3 becomes 0 while D2/D1intra give 1 for negative — inconsistent
fix: Normalize expected.resources ?? [] at top of scoreScenario

issue: routed === 0 case produces NaN via Math.max(0, 1 - 0/0) — NaN contaminates measured array and modeAScore
Negative scenario: rank > 5 success allows skill at rank 6 as pass; rank 5 scores 0 — boundary wrong (skill barely in top-5 should be partial failure for negative)
fix: Use rank > 3 for negative success, or 0.5 for rank 4-5 as marginal leak

issue: advisorMode string 'false'/'0' is truthy but not 'python' — probe skipped silently; bare --advisor-mode python not parsed correctly by _args
fix: Document =value requirement; add explicit string check or use strict equality for probe trigger

issue: d.status || 'unscored' renders '_undefined_' if status is literal string 'undefined' in JSON; == null check is correct but || fallback is loose
trigger_phrases regex requires no blank line between key and list items; blank line silently produces zero triggers
fix: Document blank-line-free requirement; add warning if trigger_phrases block exists but yields no triggers

issue: add() drops tokens with trim().length <= 2 — could miss 2-3 char skill ids like sk, py as contamination
fix: Lower threshold to > 1; document the false-positive avoidance rationale
